name: @zenithbuild/cli
description: Deterministic project orchestrator for Zenith framework

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(fs.existsSync('dist/index.js')) fs.chmodSync('dist/index.js',0o755)"
scripts.test: bun run build && node --experimental-vm-modules $(node -e "const path=require('node:path');const pkg=require.resolve('jest/package.json');process.stdout.write(path.join(path.dirname(pkg),'bin/jest.js'))") --config jest.config.js --forceExit --runInBand
